description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a collared, button-up shirt and straight-cut trousers, giving a formal or business-casual appearance. The shirt is long-sleeved and neatly tucked into the pants, which are secured with a visible belt. The figure is bald, with defined facial features and a neutral expression. The shoes are formal, closed-toe, and polished, complementing the overall professional attire. The hands are relaxed and positioned naturally at the sides, and the posture is upright and symmetrical. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a clean, tailored look.
description: A bald adult male in formal attire, featuring a collared shirt, straight trousers, and dress shoes, standing upright with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, button details, belt, and formal shoes, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the fit of the shirt and trousers, and the shoe's shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and the bald head, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, shirt fit, and shoe details from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt and straight-cut trousers with a belt, formal style
